# Radio  Free DeLand — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A round-the-clock call-in radio show based in DeLand, Florida, offering listeners the opportunity to tune in and participate live at any hour. The show has a community-driven, accessible vibe rooted in local Florida culture, with an open-door format that invites audience engagement and real-time interaction.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Radio Free DeLand is your round-the-clock call-in radio experience rooted in Florida culture. Join live, share your voice, and be part of something real. Tune in now!

### Listen
https://example.com/listen
Stream Radio Free DeLand live at any hour and jump into real-time radio / broadcasting that never sleeps. Call in, speak up, and let your voice hit the airwaves today!

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover how Radio Free DeLand became Central Florida&#39;s most open, community-driven radio / broadcasting platform — built for real people, real talk, and real connection 24/7.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to call in, collaborate, or connect with Radio Free DeLand? Reach our team anytime and discover how easy it is to join the lively radio / broadcasting conversation live.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Radio  Free DeLand
A round-the-clock call-in radio show based in DeLand, Florida, offering listeners the opportunity to tune in and participate live at any hour. The show has a community-driven, accessible vibe rooted in local Florida culture, with an open-door format that invites audience engagement and real-time interaction.

## Target Audience
- Night Owls
- Talk Radio Enthusiasts
- Local Community Members

## Industry
Radio / Broadcasting

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
